reason: No ARCHITECTURE.md exists. Architecture match is only 62% because structural intent is inferred from PRD. This blocks effective milestone planning as acceptance criteria cannot reference formal architecture specs. Need formal documentation of: system layers (shell → filesystem abstraction), command execution flow, error handling patterns, testing strategy, and cross-backend consistency requirements.
proposedChange: Create ARCHITECTURE.md documenting: (1) System architecture with layers diagram, (2) Command execution pipeline, (3) Error handling standards, (4) Testing requirements per component, (5) Cross-backend (browser/Electron/Node) consistency strategy, (6) Performance optimization patterns for large files/directories
